note: seq=141 read-only PG connection census (exit-0-safe). Writes /opt/atlas/conncensus.py and runs it as postgres superuser to publish status/hetzner/conncensus.json: max_connections, reserved, total, by_state, by_user, by_app, enrich_pool_active/enabled. Tells us if seq-140's trim freed enough slots or if we need pgbouncer / a deeper trim. No DB writes.

steps.note: PG conn census after pool trim
